text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But please don't concern yourself. It's just my
body aching to get back onto the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Preparations are complete. All that remains is to
unleash all I have at the opportune moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then... I shall be on my way!
